candidates.why: Primary revenue line; matches Total Revenue exactly and is the standard top-line label.
Duplicate total of Revenues; kept as fallback in case label changes across years.
This is a cost line, not revenue; only considered if misclassification occurred, so low priority.
Clearly a cost line (COGS), not suitable for revenue; very low priority fallback only by schema.
Operating income, not revenue; not appropriate except as extreme fallback.

variables.notes: Revenues and Total Revenue have identical values; Revenues chosen as primary top-line.

candidates.why: Standard COGS label; appropriate even though preview shows nan, as values may exist in other years.
Explicitly labeled COGS; also appropriate; kept as alternate in case of differing coverage by year.

candidates.row_label: Cost of Goods and Services Sold
candidates.why: Another COGS synonym; no data in preview but may exist historically.

final_choice.row_label: Cost of Goods and Services Sold

variables.notes: All three are COGS-type labels; prioritized the most explicit COGS wording first.

candidates.why: Classic SG&A personnel/overhead cost; not labeled as total and not COGS.
Overhead operating expenses; appropriate SG&A component (non-COGS, non-D&A).
Explicit SG&A line; appears populated at least in the most recent year.

variables.notes: Explicit SG&A row exists but is mostly empty in preview, so included it plus key overhead buckets (Personnel Expenses and Other Operating Expenses) per hierarchy rule (b).
No R&D-related candidate rows provided; treat XRD as zero.

candidates.why: Main interest/finance expense aggregation line; good proxy for interest expense when detailed split is also given.
Pure interest expense line; preferred when available.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest on lease liabilities; component of interest expense, useful if main line missing.

candidates.row_label: Interest and Other Financial Expense rest
candidates.why: Residual financial expense line; only minor component.
Represents profit attributable to NCI, not interest; should not be used for XINT.
Same as non-controlling interest; not an interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental detail of lease interest; minor but valid interest component.
Balance sheet accrual, not period expense; not ideal for XINT.
Equity of minorities; not interest expense.
Same as above; not interest expense.
Liability, not expense; not used for XINT.
Accrued interest on balance sheet; not the P&L expense itself.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Prioritized pure interest expense, then broader finance expense, then lease-interest components as fallbacks.

candidates.why: Income statement line, not stock of equity; not suitable for BE.
Refers to income attributable, not equity balance; not correct for BE.
Component of equity, not total; less suitable than total equity lines.
Explicit total shareholders' equity; valid measure of book equity.
Includes shareholders' equity plus non-controlling interests; best proxy for total book equity depending on PROF definition.

variables.notes: Chose Total equity as primary book equity measure, with Total Shareholders' Equity - Total as secondary option.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution to NCI; useful but not the balance sheet interest itself.
Same as Non-controlling interest; duplicate naming on income statement.
Balance sheet minority equity; best representation of MIB.
Duplicate label for non-controlling interests on balance sheet; also valid.

variables.notes: Prioritized balance sheet minority equity as MIB, with income statement attributions as secondary fallbacks.
